'''Aehrrley Rue'''<ref name="CSWE" /> was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]]<ref name="Episode I" /> [[Gender/Legends|male]] freelance [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].<ref name="CSWE" /> He<ref name="YJCCG" /> frequented [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]],<ref name="MosEspa">{{DB|location|mosespa|Mos Espa}}</ref> during the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. In that [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|I}}, which includes the [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]], to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> he was in the stands of the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]], cheering when the [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] passed through the arena in the lead for the race's first lap, before it was another podracer, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], who won in the end.<ref name="Episode I" /> Rue wore a [[Color/Legends|black]] and yellow [[Environment suit/Legends|spacesuit]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Aehrrley Rue first appeared in the [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], the first film in the [[prequel trilogy]]. Within the film, two extras in the same outfit are onscreen in the streets of Mos Espa, before a later scene when one extra is visible among the podracing spectators.<ref name="Episode I" /> In [[2001]], the name of Aehrrley Rue was first established in the [[Boonta Eve Podrace (YJCCG)|''Boonta Eve Podrace'']] expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s ''[[Young Jedi Collectible Card Game]]'', with an image of an individual wearing the black and yellow jumpsuit<ref name="YJCCG" /> taken from the Mos Espa streets in ''The Phantom Menace''.<ref name="Episode I" /> It was only in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' where Rue was further established to be the extra [[in-universe]] in the podracing scene.<ref name="CSWE" />
